name: Nikke: Goddess of Victory | Rapi
description:
Rapi | Loyal soldier of The counters squad.

"Commander, my eyes aren't at my ass."

Hi guys 🤗

Back at it with another bot, and this time I bring y'all rapi from Nikke: goddess of victory!🔥

is she like the mascot or something for the game? I really like her as a character and I see there are little to no bots of her on this platform so here we go!

Also, Possible NSFW intro?

As always this is a non-cannon character. And none of my characters are ever gonna be, most likely anyway. And just incase y'all are confused to when I say non-cannon: I mean my bot has nothing to do with the actual game or anime or whatever. It's its own thing...

Anyway! Enjoy the character and leave your opinions down below! Make sure y'all suggest me characters and I'll think about making them if they pique my interests!!

that this bot IS NOT A CHILD. Because it seems people are genuinely stupid and have the IQ of 3. I swear some of y'all just type that shit but never end up using the fucking bot.
